title: refact: use uptime.minutes instead of uptime.seconds
body:
In the `libpod/info.go`, within the `uptime` anonymous struct, there's a `minutes` field, but `seconds` are being used for processing. This PR refactors this issue.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Ignore cockpit rawhide failure. Suspect it's a mirror sync issue.
